description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the microsoft/dotnet:2.1-sdk Docker image and a global before_script that runs `dotnet --version` and `dotnet restore` for every job. Define variables `project` set to Vulcan and `testProject` set to VulcanTest. Add a build stage with a `build` job that sets its `build_path` variable to `$project` and executes `dotnet build Vulcan`. Add a test stage with a `test` job that sets its `build_path` variable to `$testProject` and runs `dotnet test VulcanTest`. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are required.
